Discount color explanation

Blue discount Product has not been this cheap before (new historical low). Lighter blue discount New historical low (rare discount): Previous historical low was set 1.5+ years ago, or significant price drop (50%+). Green discount Product is priced on par with lowest recorded price. Purple discount Product is priced on par with lowest recorded price in last two years.
